formList.label: End Time

hint.view:
Please do not include the following sensitive words in the email subject or content, as they may result in the email being marked as spam:
Drug-related: Methamphetamine, Heroin, Marijuana, Drug manufacturing, Drug trafficking
Violent crimes: Homicide, Robbery, Kidnapping, Explosion, Arson
Financial crimes: Money laundering, Illegal fund-raising, Fraud, Pyramid schemes, Underground banks
Virtual currency violations: Bitcoin money laundering, ICO financing, Illegal virtual currency transactions
Illegal financial management: High-interest deposit solicitation, Principal and interest guarantee (for unregulated financial institutions), Unlisted share peddling, "Get-rich-quick" financial products
False promises: 100% profit guarantee, Zero risk, Risk-free profits
Illegal marketing: Extreme terms prohibited by the Advertising Law (e.g., "Top-tier", "No.1"), False discounts (e.g., "Fire-sale price", "Liquidation price" without valid basis)
Others: Smuggling, Firearm trafficking, Illegal acquisition of personal information
